_comment: Publicly-reported / suspected insider wallets. The scanner FORCE-ENRICHES these every tick (priority, never evicted) so they get a full on-chain record, then scores them with the SAME detector suite as everything else — they publish ONLY if they independently clear the bar (no special treatment, no fabricated flags). Entries may give an 'address' (preferred) OR a 'username' (resolved to a proxy address via Polymarket at scan time, best-effort). Web research (June 2026) confirmed only the Maduro case has public 0x addresses; the other named cases were reported by Polymarket handle only.

cases.label: Magamyman
cases.source: NPR + Harvard/SSRN; first trade ~71 min before news, reported profit ~$553k
